response.text: I'll list the internal packages to see where the reservation lifecycle is implemented.
The booking package looks central. I'll search it for the status definitions.
Now I'll read the transition rules to confirm what governs the lifecycle.

Relevant source files: internal/booking/reservation.go defines the Status constants; internal/booking/lifecycle.go defines the permitted transitions in CanTransition; internal/api/reservations.go routes the endpoints that trigger transitions. Relevant test: internal/booking/lifecycle_test.go pins the transition matrix. The lifecycle is pending -> confirmed -> completed, with cancelled reachable from pending and confirmed.
